title: Deep Learning with Computer Vision
description: Completed a comprehensive course on computer vision techniques, CNNs, object detection, and image segmentation using Python, TensorFlow, and OpenCV.

title: Machine Learning — Advanced Learning Algorithms
description: Part of the Machine Learning Specialization by Andrew Ng at Stanford University. Covered advanced supervised learning, decision trees, ensemble methods, neural networks, and best practices for ML systems.

title: Vice President — DIU CPC (R&J Wing)
description: Appointed Vice President of the Research & Journal Wing of DIU-CPC. Led research activities, organized contests (Datathon, Prompt Battle), courses, and workshops.

title: 2nd Runner-Up — DoR Poster Presentation
description: Awarded 2nd Runner-Up in the Undergraduate Segment of the DIU Department of Research (DoR) Poster Presentation competition for research on deep learning for chest X-ray analysis.

title: Session Moderator — IDAA 2025
description: Served as Session Moderator at IDAA 2025, facilitating academic sessions on AI and intelligent data analysis.

title: ICPC Dhaka Regional — Closing Lead Volunteer
description: Served as Closing Lead Volunteer for ICPC Dhaka Regional 2024 at Daffodil International University, overseeing the closing ceremony and coordinating with organizers.
